Package Contents
----------------

.. py:function:: bar(data: anndata.AnnData, mapping: lets_plot.plot.core.FeatureSpec | None = None, *, axis: Literal[0, 1] | None = None, variable_keys: collections.abc.Sequence[str] | None = None, observations_name: str = 'Barcode', variables_name: str = 'Variable', include_dimensions: bool | int = False, interactive: bool = False, **geom_kwargs) -> lets_plot.plot.core.PlotSpec

   Bar Plot.

   :param data: The AnnData object of the single cell data.
   :type data: AnnData
   :param mapping: Aesthetic mappings for the plot, the result of `aes()`.
   :type mapping: FeatureSpec | None, default=None
   :param axis: axis of the data, 0 for observations and 1 for variables.
   :type axis: Literal[0,1] | None, default=None
   :param variable_keys: Variable keys to add to the DataFrame. If None, no additional keys are added.
   :type variable_keys: str | Sequence[str] | None, default=None
   :param axis: The axis to build the frame for. 0 for observations, 1 for variables.
   :type axis: Literal[0,1] | None, default=None
   :param observations_name: The name of the observations column.
   :type observations_name: str, default="Barcode"
   :param variables_name: Name for the variables index column.
   :type variables_name: str, default="Variable"
   :param include_dimensions: Whether to include dimensions in the DataFrame.
                              Providing an integer will limit the number of dimensions to given number.
   :type include_dimensions: bool | int, default=False
   :param interactive: Whether to make the plot interactive.
   :type interactive: bool, default=False
   :param \*\*geom_kwargs: Additional parameters for the `geom_bar` layer.
                           For more information on geom_bar parameters, see:
                           https://lets-plot.org/python/pages/api/lets_plot.geom_bar.html

   :returns: Bar plot.
   :rtype: PlotSpec


.. py:function:: heatmap(data: anndata.AnnData, mapping: lets_plot.plot.core.FeatureSpec | None = None, *, axis: Literal[0, 1] | None = None, variable_keys: collections.abc.Sequence[str] | None = None, observations_name: str = 'Barcode', variables_name: str = 'Variable', include_dimensions: bool | int = False, interactive: bool = False, **geom_kwargs) -> lets_plot.plot.core.PlotSpec

   Heatmap.

   :param data: The AnnData object of the single cell data.
   :type data: AnnData
   :param mapping: Aesthetic mappings for the plot, the result of `aes()`.
   :type mapping: FeatureSpec | None, default=None
   :param axis: axis of the data, 0 for observations and 1 for variables.
   :type axis: Literal[0,1] | None, default=None
   :param variable_keys: Variable keys to add to the DataFrame. If None, no additional keys are added.
   :type variable_keys: str | Sequence[str] | None, default=None
   :param observations_name: The name of the observations column.
   :type observations_name: str, default="Barcode"
   :param variables_name: Name for the variables index column.
   :type variables_name: str, default="Variable"
   :param include_dimensions: Whether to include dimensions in the DataFrame.
                              Providing an integer will limit the number of dimensions to given number.
   :type include_dimensions: bool | int, default=False
   :param interactive: Whether to make the plot interactive.
   :type interactive: bool, default=False
   :param \*\*geom_kwargs: Additional parameters for the `geom_bar` layer.
                           For more information on geom_bar parameters, see:
                           https://lets-plot.org/python/pages/api/lets_plot.geom_bar.html

   :returns: Heatmap.
   :rtype: PlotSpec


.. py:function:: scatter(data: anndata.AnnData, mapping: lets_plot.plot.core.FeatureSpec | None = None, *, axis: Literal[0, 1] | None = None, variable_keys: collections.abc.Sequence[str] | None = None, observations_name: str = 'Barcode', variables_name: str = 'Variable', include_dimensions: bool | int = False, interactive: bool = False, **geom_kwargs) -> lets_plot.plot.core.PlotSpec

   Scatter Plot.

   data : AnnData
       The AnnData object of the single cell data.
   mapping : FeatureSpec | None, default=None
       Aesthetic mappings for the plot, the result of `aes()`.
   axis : Literal[0,1] | None, default=None
       axis of the data, 0 for observations and 1 for variables.
   variable_keys : str | Sequence[str] | None, default=None
       Variable keys to add to the DataFrame. If None, no additional keys are added.
   axis : Literal[0,1] | None, default=None
       The axis to build the frame for. 0 for observations, 1 for variables.
   observations_name : str, default="Barcode"
       The name of the observations column.
   variables_name : str, default="Variable"
       Name for the variables index column.
   include_dimensions : bool | int, default=False
       Whether to include dimensions in the DataFrame.
       Providing an integer will limit the number of dimensions to given number.
   interactive : bool, default=False
       Whether to make the plot interactive.
   **geom_kwargs
       Additional parameters for the `geom_point` layer.
       For more information on geom_point parameters, see:
       https://lets-plot.org/python/pages/api/lets_plot.geom_point.html

   :returns: Scatter plot.
   :rtype: PlotSpec
